info@cgi.ma.apollo_desc:
Compagnie Générale Immobilière (CGI) is a prominent real estate promotion company in Morocco, established in 1960. As the operational arm of the CDG Development holding company, CGI has played a significant role in shaping the urban landscape of Morocco's major cities. The company is dedicated to enhancing quality of life through its real estate development projects and was the first Moroccan firm to achieve ISO 9001 certification in 2008.

CGI operates across various real estate segments, including residential housing, social and economic housing through its subsidiary Dyar Al Mansour, commercial and administrative spaces, and specialized facilities like hospitals and universities. The company provides tailored solutions for individual buyers, private and public investors, and local authorities. CGI is recognized as a leader in the Moroccan real estate market and has developed notable projects such as Casa Green Town and Casablanca Marina. In 2024, it was awarded "Service Client de l'année" in the high-standing real estate promotion category.

Cnexia is an outsourcing and offshoring company based in Morocco, affiliated with Bell Canada. The company focuses on customer service, IT support, and related services, aiming to create strategic partnerships through advanced technology and service excellence. Cnexia operates in multiple locations, including Fès, Rabat, and Casablanca, and employs between 501-1,000 people.

With a mission of "Futur prometteur" (Promising Future), Cnexia has earned the Best Places to Work certification in Morocco for 2024, reflecting its commitment to employee engagement, well-being, and diversity. The company specializes in telecommunications services, including customer relations, technical support, and IT support. Cnexia provides full training for its employees and fosters a dynamic work environment, emphasizing professional growth and agility in the telecommunications industry.

contact@inkway.ai.apollo_desc:
SIMPLE. MESURABLE. HUMAIN.

Chez INKWAY, nous avons une conviction : l'IA n'a de sens que si elle améliore la performance humaine. Nous ne sommes pas là pour le "hype", mais pour créer le déclic et transformer votre métier concrètement.

Nous accompagnons les décideurs et les organisations à travers notre écosystème en 3 pôles :

 1. INKWAY ACADEMY
Pour passer de la théorie à l'action. Nos programmes sont certifiants et orientés pratique.
• Masterway : Sessions intensives pour maîtriser l'IA stratégique.
• Pilote IA : Parcours certifiant complet pour devenir un expert opérationnel.
• Workshops Métiers : Ateliers ciblés (RH, Marketing, Finance) pour un impact immédiat.

 2. INKWAY ENTREPRISES
Transformez votre organisation avec une IA utile et rentable.
• Diagnostic & Feuille de route : Audit de maturité et stratégie IA alignée sur vos objectifs business.
• Formation Intra-Entreprise : Montée en compétence de vos équipes sur vos propres cas d'usage.
• Objectif : Un gain de productivité mesurable et un ROI clair.

 3. INKWAY LAB
Nous créons vos outils de demain.
• Développement d'Assistants et Agent IA sur-mesure (Support, Analyse, Gestion).
• Automatisation de workflows complexes pour libérer vos talents des tâches répétitives.

 POURQUOI INKWAY ?
Nous construisons la référence marocaine de l'IA appliquée. Notre approche "Inspire → Expérimente → Transforme" garantit que vous ne repartez pas seulement avec des connaissances, mais avec des solutions.

 PRÊT À ACTIVER VOTRE POTENTIEL IA ?

Réservez votre Diagnostic IA offert aux décideurs.

recrutement@goandev.net.apollo_desc:
GO & DEV is a nearshore digital development agency founded in 2017. The company specializes in recruiting and deploying digital experts to assist businesses with their technology needs. GO & DEV has experienced significant growth by partnering with clients across various sectors, including e-commerce, insurance, finance, and health. Their client base includes large enterprises, mid-sized companies, and fast-growing SMEs.

The agency offers a range of services, including digital transformation support, data-driven process optimization, and automation and AI solutions. They focus on helping end-users modernize operations and assisting software publishers in accelerating project roadmaps. GO & DEV is committed to sustainable innovation and social responsibility, believing that technology can drive positive change while respecting the environment and strengthening communities.

sofrecom.experts@sofrecom.com.apollo_tech: AI, Facebook Custom Audiences, Facebook Login (Connect), Facebook Widget, Google Tag Manager
sofrecom.experts@sofrecom.com.apollo_desc:
Sofrecom is a consulting and engineering firm specializing in telecommunications, founded in 1966 as a subsidiary of the Orange Group. Headquartered in Vincennes, France, the company supports the digital transformation and sustainable development of over 200 clients, including telecom operators, governments, and international institutions. With approximately 1,400 employees, Sofrecom generates $428.6 million in annual revenue.

The firm offers a range of consulting services in business, network, and IT to enhance operational performance. Key areas of expertise include innovation and digitalization, IT and telecom network engineering, and sustainable development. Sofrecom operates internationally with offices in regions such as the Middle East, Argentina, Morocco, Benin, and Georgia, focusing on various sectors including e-government and telecom transformation. The company emphasizes co-construction, know-how transfer, and customer-centric approaches to meet diverse technical and cultural needs.

coface.maroc@coface.com.apollo_tech: .NET, AI, Amazon AWS, Ataccama One, Eloqua
coface.maroc@coface.com.apollo_desc:
Coface, or Compagnie Française d'Assurance pour le Commerce Extérieur, is a global leader in trade credit insurance and risk management solutions. Founded in 1946, the company specializes in helping exporters manage credit risks and operates in over 100 countries, serving more than 100,000 clients across nearly 200 international markets. With a workforce of around 4,100 employees, Coface has established a strong presence worldwide.

Coface offers a range of services, including trade credit insurance, debt collection, factoring, business information services, surety bonds, and single risk insurance. The company also provides specialized solutions like Coface Global Solutions for multinationals and TopLiner for additional credit coverage. Coface assesses risks in 160-162 countries and 13 business sectors, publishing country risk ratings based on payment behavior. With an 18% market share in European credit insurance, Coface is well-positioned to support client growth in various environments.

contact@mercureit.com.apollo_desc:
MERCURE IT is a technology services company founded in 2008. The company focuses on delivering client satisfaction by actively listening to customer needs and fulfilling its promises. MERCURE IT emphasizes a customer-centric approach, aiming to build strong relationships with clients through understanding and commitment.

While specific services or products are not detailed, MERCURE IT operates as a tech services provider, dedicated to enhancing client happiness. The company’s core messaging highlights its commitment to attentive service and meeting client expectations.

careercentersupport@fhi360.org.apollo_desc:
FHI 360 is a nonprofit human development organization established in 1971, dedicated to advancing global health, equity, and well-being. With a presence in over 50 countries and a team of more than 2,200 experts, FHI 360 focuses on data-driven, locally led solutions to address challenges such as economic opportunity, health improvement, and humanitarian crises.

The organization offers a variety of technical services, including research and data analysis, health programs in family planning and infectious diseases, and development initiatives that encompass education and civil society strengthening. FHI 360 emphasizes partnerships with governments, communities, and the private sector to create evidence-based solutions. It also oversees several affiliated entities, including the FHI Foundation and FHI Clinical, which enhance its capacity to deliver impactful programs and innovations.

B2I is an engineering design bureau located in Casablanca, Morocco, established in 2018. The company brings together the skills of French and Moroccan engineers, focusing on a bicultural approach in its development philosophy.

B2I specializes in creating execution documents and design studies for construction projects. The firm emphasizes consistency, rigor, and high-quality service, catering to both Moroccan and international clients. Its expertise spans various sectors within tertiary construction, including office buildings, hotels, healthcare facilities, educational institutions, entertainment venues, and industrial projects. B2I operates as a small firm with a dedicated team of 1-10 employees.

contact@jbel-annour.ma.apollo_desc:
Briqueterie Jbel Annour is a Moroccan manufacturer based in Mohammedia, specializing in sustainable clay products, particularly red bricks. The company operates as an S.A.R.L. with a capital of 50,730,000 DH and employs between 100 to 499 workers. With an annual turnover estimated between 50 to 100 million DH, Briqueterie Jbel Annour boasts a production capacity of 800 tonnes per day, supported by 20 years of industry experience.

The company offers a variety of hollow clay bricks, including 3-hole, 6-hole, 8-hole, and 12-hole options, as well as clay tiles. They focus on durability and sustainability, with a strong commitment to recycling, revalorizing 94% of their waste. Briqueterie Jbel Annour positions itself as a key supplier of building and construction materials, contributing to major projects with a focus on client satisfaction and operational efficiency.

The company specializes in providing complex technical solutions across various sectors, including transformation and manufacturing, mining, oil and gas, and tertiary buildings and infrastructure.

The firm is known for its integrated approach, combining precision and creativity while adhering to international standards. Expert Eye Engineering's teams of experts tackle complex technical and environmental challenges, delivering customized and sustainable solutions. The company employs between 51-200 people and is led by a team of experienced professionals, including CEO Mohamed Boukhizou and Director of Operations Saad Boukhizzou.

INNOV Engineering Consulting is an engineering consulting firm based in Rabat, Morocco. The company specializes in providing innovative and sustainable solutions for environmental and infrastructure challenges. With a strong presence in Morocco and Guinea Conakry, INNOV leverages its regional expertise to serve clients across Africa and beyond.

The firm offers a range of services in various domains, including transport planning, transport infrastructure, potable water, environmental projects, geology, geotechnics, and sustainable building practices. INNOV is committed to client satisfaction, technical excellence, and ethical integrity, focusing on optimizing existing assets and developing multimodal solutions that meet market demands. The company operates within the building and public works, construction, real estate, architecture, and urban planning sectors.

dpo@outsourcia-group.com.apollo_desc:
Groupe Outsourcia is a French-Moroccan outsourcing company founded in 2003, specializing in customer relationship management (CRM), back-office processing (BPO), and digital services. Headquartered in Casablanca, Morocco, the company operates across France, Morocco, Tunisia, Madagascar, and Niger, employing approximately 3,300 to 4,300 people across 12 production sites. In 2024, Outsourcia reported a revenue of €58.8 million.

The company offers a range of services, including multilingual and multi-channel CRM support, data processing, web and mobile app development, and digital marketing solutions. Outsourcia emphasizes a hybrid model that combines onshore services in Europe with offshore and nearshore capabilities in Africa. It serves various sectors, including banking, telecommunications, e-commerce, and healthcare, and is recognized for its commitment to client success and employee development. The company has achieved multiple ISO certifications and has been ranked among France's top outsourcers.

contact@sorec.ma.apollo_desc:
SOREC is a public company in Morocco's equine industry, specializing in horse racing betting and the broader equestrian sector. With over 70 years of experience, SOREC operates a fully computerized and secure betting system and plays a significant role in promoting Moroccan horse racing on an international scale.

The company markets horse racing games through various channels, including 800 retail outlets, 23 commercial agencies, and 7 racecourses in major cities like Casablanca and Marrakech. SOREC also offers an online betting platform and telephone betting services. In 2022, they launched specialty betting shops to enhance brand visibility and customer experience. Additionally, SOREC has established international partnerships, allowing Moroccan bettors to wager on prestigious French races alongside local events, further enriching their betting options.

AXA S.A. is a leading French multinational insurance corporation based in Paris. With a history dating back to 1816-1817, it began as a small mutual insurer focused on property and casualty coverage. Over the years, AXA has expanded significantly through strategic acquisitions, becoming one of the world's largest insurers. The company operates in over 50 countries, serving more than 100 million customers and employing around 160,000 people globally.

AXA offers a diverse range of insurance and financial products, including property and casualty insurance, life and health insurance, and asset management services. The company emphasizes innovation and sustainability, aiming to provide comprehensive financial protection and empower individuals to live better lives. Key subsidiaries include AXA XL, AXA Health, and AXA Ireland, reflecting its strong presence in Europe, North America, and emerging markets.

websitecontact@tescagroup.com.apollo_desc:
Tesca Group is a French company specializing in automotive textiles and seat components. Founded in Paris in 1836, it began as a family-run textile business and rebranded to Tesca in 2018. The company operates as a privately owned, medium-sized automotive supplier with a global presence, employing over 5,000 people across 14 locations in Europe, North Africa, Russia, Asia, Latin America, and North America.

Tesca designs and manufactures advanced ergonomic seat components and automotive textiles, including headrests, armrests, seat upholstery, and padding. The company holds numerous patents for its innovative designs and focuses on delivering premium service with an emphasis on comfort, safety, and design. With plans to double its revenue by 2025, Tesca continues to expand its reach and capabilities in the automotive industry.

contact@bottu.com.apollo_desc:
BOTTU, also known as Laboratoires BOTTU or Bottu Pharmaceuticals, is a prominent pharmaceutical company based in Casablanca, Morocco. Founded in 1952, it specializes in drug manufacturing, producing over 45 million units annually with a capacity of up to 60 million units. BOTTU is recognized as the leading laboratory in Morocco by production volume and has made significant advancements, including the acquisition of the Doliprane brand and the establishment of multiple manufacturing sites.

The company offers a diverse range of products, including generic drugs and homeopathic items, with over 34 products available. Notable offerings include Alyse capsules and Acigam tablets, as well as a variety of homeopathic products from the Boiron range. BOTTU is committed to high-quality standards and has received multiple certifications, including ISO 9001 and ISO 14001. With a focus on employee development and sustainable growth, BOTTU aims to enhance health outcomes through its mission, "YOUR HEALTH, OUR MISSION."

ecommerce@bricoma.ma.apollo_desc:
Bricoma is a prominent Moroccan retail chain that specializes in DIY, gardening, hardware, tools, and home improvement products. Founded in 2004 by Mohamed Filali Chahad, the company has grown to become Morocco's leading DIY retailer, operating around 20 stores across 15-16 cities. Bricoma's headquarters is located near Casablanca-Rabat, and it employs between 201 and 500 people.

The company offers over 8,500 products, including tools, gardening supplies, home decor, and electrical equipment. Bricoma provides both in-store and online shopping options, along with home delivery and financing solutions. The stores also offer expert advice to help customers with their projects, contributing to the development of Morocco's DIY culture. Bricoma aims to expand to 25 stores by the end of 2025 and 30 by 2030, creating additional job opportunities in the process.

LA FONDA is a Moroccan company founded in 1994 that specializes in premium meat processing and gourmet food products. The company operates a network of 10 exclusive shops in major cities across Morocco and maintains a halal poultry slaughterhouse certified under IFS V6 standards. LA FONDA emphasizes high-quality production without chemical preservatives and focuses on continuous innovation in food solutions.

The company offers a diverse range of products tailored to various needs, including daily meals, reception options, children's meals, and barbecue solutions. LA FONDA also supports franchisees with comprehensive services, including training, operational support, and marketing assistance. The franchise model includes a franchise fee, ongoing fees, and specific area requirements for potential franchisees.

With a small team of fewer than 10 employees, Interface Communication focuses on providing creative advertising and communication services.

The agency specializes in marketing communications and consultancy, helping businesses enhance their brand visibility and market presence. Interface Communication develops and executes advertising campaigns tailored to its clients' needs. The company's annual turnover is estimated to be between 1,000,000 and 5,000,000 Moroccan Dirhams, reflecting its active role in the local advertising market.

The company specializes in data and AI, cybersecurity, and hyperautomation, helping major clients and public organizations enhance their business processes. Babel offers a wide range of professional and managed services, utilizing API-based tools, cloud solutions, and SaaS. Their healthcare solutions focus on patient management, hospital interoperability, and cybersecurity for medical IoT devices. In cybersecurity, they provide managed services for AWS environments. The company also emphasizes data and AI-driven technologies, including hyper-automation and machine learning applications. Babel's expertise extends to cloud operations, infrastructure software, and IoT, ensuring comprehensive support for digital business challenges.

AXA Assurance Maroc is a prominent insurance company in Morocco, established in 2000 as a subsidiary of the global AXA Group. Headquartered in Casablanca, the company employs between 1,001 and 5,000 people and reported a turnover of 4,871 million dirhams in 2020. AXA Assurance Maroc offers a wide range of insurance, protection, and risk management solutions tailored for individuals, professionals, and businesses.

The company provides various products, including auto and motorcycle insurance, home insurance, health coverage, and savings plans for individuals. For businesses, it offers property protection, liability insurance, and collective health plans. AXA Assurance Maroc is committed to corporate social responsibility, focusing on prevention, education, and risk reduction. Additionally, its subsidiary, AXA Crédit S.A., offers consumer credit services, enhancing its financial solutions for clients. -Conseil, accompagnement et formation en immobilier : ABY Finance accompagne les investisseurs à travers toute la chaine de valeur immobilière : Négociation, Acquisition, Structuration, Financement (fond propres et dette), Montage, Due diligence, Expertise, formation et mise à niveau des équipes.
-Intermédiation immobilière : Il s'agit de rechercher, à travers sa marque AL WASSATA Immo et pour le compte de ses clients, des crédits bancaires (courtage en crédit immobilier) ou des actifs immobiliers (intermédiation sur du foncier et commercialisation des ensembles résidentiels ou des programmes mixtes).

ABY Finance est également :
-Une démarche orientée client, qui privilégie la proximité, l'innovation et la qualité de service.
-Des profils diversifiés dotés d'un savoir faire pluridisciplinaire, maîtrisant le sous-jacent qui est l'immobilier et formés aux meilleurs standards internationaux et dans de prestigieuses écoles.
-Une éthique garantissant objectivité, confidentialité et respect des règles de déontologie.

image-demo@3x-100-400x300.jp.apollo_desc:
Maghreb Steel is Morocco's only producer of flat steel, based in Casablanca since 1975. The company has grown significantly from its beginnings as a steel tube manufacturer and is now a major player in the Moroccan steel industry. It operates multiple production facilities, with its main complex in Tit Mellil featuring an electric arc furnace capable of producing 1,200 thousand tonnes of crude steel annually. The company also runs the Bled Solb steel complex, which includes various steel production facilities.

Maghreb Steel manufactures a wide range of flat steel products, including hot-rolled and cold-rolled steel coils, galvanized coils, pre-painted coils, sandwich panels, and quarto plates. These products cater to various sectors such as automotive, construction, energy, and transport. The company generates sales of around MAD 5 billion and employs approximately 1,300 people, exporting over half of its production internationally. Maghreb Steel is also focused on expanding into automotive steel production, with plans to produce up to 200,000 tons annually for that sector.

a.ghizlane@saadis.ma.apollo_desc:
As a Belgian-run communications agency in Morocco with international collaborators, we help you with Online Communication, Marketing, and Administrative Tasks to launch and grow your SME in Belgium, the Netherlands, France, Luxembourg, Switzerland, Spain, Morocco, and the United Arab Emirates. 

Our expertise spans Inbox Marketing, Social Media Management, and SEO-optimized websites and webshops—all designed to create meaningful connections with your customers in English, Arabic, German, French, and Dutch. We transform prospects into loyal clients through strategic Content Marketing, while our Virtual Assistance team takes care of administrative tasks and translations. Through targeted Link Building across our online business and lifestyle magazines, we amplify your reach and strengthen your brand visibility across all markets where you operate. 

We work closely with our clients as trusted partners, delivering high-quality communication and marketing solutions that drive real business growth. Through honest guidance and practical support, we empower SMEs with the tools and knowledge they need to succeed independently.

Our philosophy is that every business deserves more than just marketing services—they deserve a true partner invested in their long-term success. We believe sustainable growth is built on authentic communication, strategic thinking, and genuine relationships that create lasting value. We don't just deliver campaigns; we build foundations for businesses to thrive independently. By combining practical solutions with honest guidance, we empower our clients to navigate the digital landscape confidently while staying true to their values. Your success strengthens your community, and that ripple effect of positive impact drives everything we do. We're here to support your journey with transparency, creativity, and an unwavering commitment to helping you build a business that endures.

Nous opérons un modèle e-commerce/omnicanal centré sur l'expérience patient : information claire, commande en ligne, livraison nationale et accompagnement après-vente.

investor.relations@cegedim.com.apollo_tech: .NET, 24-7 Media, AI, AMP, AWS SDK for JavaScript
investor.relations@cegedim.com.apollo_desc:
Cegedim is a global technology and services company founded in 1969 in France. It specializes in digital data flow management, software solutions, and services for healthcare ecosystems, life sciences, insurance companies, and B2B sectors. The company operates in over 10 countries, including France, the UK, and the US, employing around 6,700 people. Cegedim reported revenue exceeding €654 million in 2024.

Cegedim offers a wide range of products and services tailored to the healthcare industry. This includes pharmacy management software, electronic medical records, e-prescribing systems, and various data management solutions. The company also provides CRM tools for life sciences and business process outsourcing services. With a focus on cloud and SaaS solutions, Cegedim supports healthcare professionals and organizations in optimizing their operations and enhancing patient care.
